comment: Moondial rules metadata (plan §5e: the SVG carries shape, this file carries scoring/mode rules). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/Modes.ts.

telescope.comment: Kickout scoop: each capture awards the next sighting in order (wrapping); the last sighting also spots one orbit toward the eclipse.

skill.comment: FIRST LIGHT (differentiation pass): a soft plunge peaking in the sensor-skill-firstlight band (fires at <= maxSpeed m/s) pays points and spots one moon lane. Once per ball.

alignScope.comment: ALIGN THE SCOPE (DMD video mode): completing the sightings cycle lights it; the next telescope capture holds the ball while the flippers nudge a drifting reticle onto each star. Timer-driven (sim-safe).
